div.h2: Hardware Soul: HTTP GET Hot Path — Cycle & Cache Cost Analysis

text.tspan: (TCP segment arrives, DMA → kernel rcv buf)

ul.li: L2 TLB: ~1,500 entries on typical x86
Result: frequent TLB misses for cold connections
Mitigation: mmap(MAP_HUGETLB) → 2MB pages → only ~130 TLB entries needed

text.tspan: (1 cycle/byte, buffer warm from NIC DMA)
All in L1 (just written by read())

g.text: 0 cycles for CPU — NIC handles independently

text.tspan: (only on first write after EAGAIN — rare on loopback)
